query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale,
  MIN(subscribedAt) as primo_iscritto,
  MAX(subscribedAt) as ultimo_iscritto,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) < '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pre_integrazione,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as post_integrazione,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= '2026-05-11' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ultimi_2gg
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale,
  MIN(subscribedAt) as primo_iscritto,
  MAX(subscribedAt) as ultimo_iscritto,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) < '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pre_integrazione,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= '2026-05-10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as post_integrazione,
  SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(subscribedAt) >= '2026-05-11' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ultimi_2gg
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active';
